title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Diy Home Improvement Combined With Xlp Relative Strength
thesis: A spike in interest in DIY home improvement often precedes increased demand for consumer staples related to home care and building materials. Consumer staples benefit from increased home improvement spending signals.
data_sources: Google Trends weekly for 'home improvement' and Yahoo Finance weekly prices for XLP
signal_logic: Enter long XLP when Google Trends for 'home improvement' rises more than 15% week-over-week and XLP outperforms SPY over prior week
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLP when Google Trends for 'home improvement' rises more than 15% week-over-week and XLP outperforms SPY over prior week Exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if Google Trends decline by 10% week-over-week
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly for 'home improvement' and Yahoo Finance weekly prices for XLP via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly Google Trends data frequently show interest bursts around seasonal home projects.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for DIY home improvement combined with XLP relative strength

data.source: Google Trends weekly for 'home improvement' and Yahoo Finance weekly prices for XLP

schema.behavior: A spike in interest in DIY home improvement often precedes increased demand for consumer staples related to home care and building materials.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer staples benefit from increased home improvement spending signals.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLP when Google Trends for 'home improvement' rises more than 15% week-over-week and XLP outperforms SPY over prior week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if Google Trends decline by 10% week-over-week

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly Google Trends data frequently show interest bursts around seasonal home projects.
